title: ConfigurationVersionRequest
description:
Provide the currentVersionId. If rowId is provided, the version IDs refer to row versions automatically.
The previousVersionId is optional to support describing the first version (no previous).

currentVersionId.description: ID of the current version. If rowId is present, this refers to the current row version; otherwise it refers to the configuration version.

previousVersionId.description: ID of the previous version. If rowId is present, this refers to the previous row version. Optional; set null for first version.

rowId.description: Configuration row ID. If provided, currentVersionId/previousVersionId are interpreted as row version IDs.
